memories.content: Waves 1-10 CRUD (2026-01-14). Market Data Pipeline 253K records (2026-02-05). ReportSettings + Zod (2026-02-07). Sales Analysis Dashboard (2026-02-10). Construction Pipeline (2026-02-11). UW Model Grouping Pipeline Phase 3-4 (2026-03-03). Activity logging, Docker, Tech Debt (2026-02-12). Extraction Hardening + Accessibility (2026-03-03). Login Flow + Auth Guards (2026-03-03). Local OneDrive Extraction (2026-03-03). Deals Page Overhaul: kanban cards, aerial maps, activity feed, SharePoint links (2026-03-04). Deals v5: Returns fix, Compare Deals, shadcn CSS (2026-03-04). Tasks 5+6+4+8 (2026-03-05): Group Pipeline Frontend, Vite optimization, page reviews. Cap Rate TC T3 extraction re-run bb86307f (13/13 files, 12870 values). Extraction audit: 7 issues fixed at 9b5f8ef (thread safety, stale runs, GOING_IN_CAP_RATE F26, int hash, LOCAL_DEALS_ROOT guard, slow tests, ESLint). Tests: 1684 backend + 721 frontend = 2405 total.

conda env: dashboard-backend. Backend port 8000, Frontend port 5173. Dev command: npm run dev:all. Git: stash apply over pop, don't push unless asked. NO mock/fake data — show errors instead. User: matt@bandrcapital.com / Wildcats777!! / admin. Thorough validation — test ALL files. Open to parallel Claude Agent Teams. Review each page in depth before deployment. Security audit deferred. User prefers status prompt: 'What was last completed and what's next?' MEMORY.md auto-restores context — no copy-paste needed.

pydantic-settings 2.x: CORS_ORIGINS JSON array. Single .env in root, symlinked. DB: PostgreSQL localhost:5432/dashboard_interface_data. SQLite in tests: no server_default, datetime.now(UTC), StaticPool. Pre-commit: ruff, ruff-format, mypy. Auth: OAuth2PasswordRequestForm x-www-form-urlencoded 'username'. passlib: wrap verify_password in try/except. Auth pattern: require_analyst (GET), require_manager (mutations). Zod: .nullable().optional() + ?? undefined (NOT ?? 0). TWO API CLIENTS: src/lib/api.ts (axios) + src/lib/api/client.ts (fetch), both attach Bearer. shadcn needs CSS vars in :root + tailwind mappings. KPICard: trend && trend > 0 is falsy for 0, use !== undefined && !== 0. ESLint: NO component definitions inside render (react-hooks/static-components).

LOCAL_DEALS_ROOT=/mnt/c/Users/MattBorgeson/OneDrive - B&R Capital/B&R Capital - Real Estate/Deals. STAGE_FOLDER_MAP maps 6 folders to DealStage. ~1,169 cell mappings from reference file. 6 supplemental overrides: GOING_IN_CAP_RATE (F26 Assumptions Summary), T3_RETURN_ON_COST (G27 Assumptions Summary), UNLEVERED/LEVERED IRR+MOIC (E39-E44 Returns Metrics Summary). ErrorHandler is now thread-safe (Lock). Stale runs auto-fail after 30 min. Int hash mismatch fixed in _normalize_value_from_text. Empty LOCAL_DEALS_ROOT guard added. Slow fingerprint tests excluded by default (-m 'not slow').

NEXT: Re-run extraction to pick up GOING_IN_CAP_RATE mapping. Production hosting (Oracle Cloud Free Tier or Hetzner CX22). FUTURE: Mobile iOS, Security audit. INFO items (no code fix): T3=0.0 for Broadstone/Park on Bell, negative returns Element at Tempe North, The Northern value revision, WickerTree new property.
